calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-24-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated 07/26/1999 is admitted to probate. Shawn Alexander Ward is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for September 28, 2027 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee. Disclosure: The assigned probate referee is married to a legal advisory staff member of this court.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-03-2026 Continued To Mar-24-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
